summary: Accept asset name or asset_tag as the GET /assets/{display_id} argument by issuing a one-shot /assets?filter=name:'…' (or asset_tag:'…') resolver before the canonical GET fires.
reason: The OpenAPI path parameter is the numeric display_id, but the identifiers humans and agents actually have are name and asset_tag. The generator emitted a path-only command that returned 404 on every human-readable input.
validated_outcome: `assets get LAPTOP-001` resolves the asset_tag to its display_id and returns the asset record; previously returned HTTP 404.
